author: doll-agent
content: Added fromfile() / fromfunction() / fromstring() to ferray-core::creation. fromfunction takes FnMut(&[usize]) -> T (per-element coordinate, simpler than NumPy's broadcasting API). fromstring/fromfile parse whitespace- or sep-delimited tokens via T: FromStr. Binary mode of NumPy's fromfile/fromstring is intentionally omitted — use ferray-io::load for .npy or frombuffer for raw bytes. Re-exported at top level via ferray crate. 5 unit tests cover whitespace/comma/empty-sep/parse-error paths.
